actual_runtime_data_directory: <process working directory>/data by default; exact Railway value is exported at runtime
duplicate_defect_scope: code-level crash/restart idempotency defect confirmed; duplicates in current Railway data not proven
duplicate_root_causes: random trade IDs without stable candidate identity
no duplicate check before opening a hypothesis position
no duplicate check before appending a closed trade
trade persistence could precede last_processed_candles checkpoint
counter_mismatch_limitation: exact reconciliation requires Railway runtime exports

counter_semantics.production_would_allow_count: cumulative raw candidates allowed by shadow production decision
counter_semantics.production_would_block_count: cumulative raw candidates blocked by shadow production decision
counter_semantics.shadow_blocked_but_tracked_count: cumulative blocked raw candidates still tracked in research

verification_results.run_all_dry_run: exit 0; sandbox_run_all single_service; safety flags false
verification_results.independent_tester: READY; 15 focused tests passed; no remaining findings

persistence.without_railway_volume: ephemeral and not durable across redeploy/container replacement
